requirements.title: Strict TypeScript and runtime validation
requirements.instruction: Flag changes that weaken strict typing, remove schema validation, or rely on unchecked any-like behavior for request, response, or model output handling.

requirements.title: No hardcoded secrets or sensitive runtime config
requirements.instruction: Flag hardcoded secrets, tokens, credentials, admin identities, or other sensitive values that should live in SSM, Secrets Manager, or GitHub-managed secret configuration.

requirements.title: Least-privilege IAM and safe infrastructure changes
requirements.instruction: Flag wildcard IAM actions or resources, broad trust policies, destructive Terraform patterns, or infrastructure changes that weaken current security posture.

requirements.title: Module quality, Terraform tests, and environment roots
requirements.instruction: Flag Terraform changes that bypass reusable modules without reason, skip module metadata/docs updates, or change module behavior without updating Terraform tests or validation paths.

requirements.title: Operational maturity and observability
requirements.instruction: Flag changes that remove or break structured logging, alarms, dashboards, deployment safety, or branch-based delivery behavior.

requirements.title: Challenge submission evidence
requirements.instruction: Flag changes that remove or stale the committed architecture diagram, grader docs, AGENTS guidance, or PR workflow evidence expected for the submission.

requirements.title: Tests for user-visible or security-relevant behavior
requirements.instruction: Flag user-visible, persistence, auth, governance, cost, or infrastructure behavior changes that do not add or update the relevant tests.
